title: 'Figment of imagination': Pakistan rejects reports of failure to initiate US, Iran talks
summary_full: Pakistan has refuted media claims of stalled US-Iran peace talks, calling them baseless fabrications.  Despite reports of initial progress and exchanged proposals, the foreign office denies any official statements on the matter. The conflict escalated after joint US-Israel strikes on Iran, leading to retaliatory actions and disrupted energy supplies.
